selected_queue_state.selection_rule: No active continuity-owned canonical item exists; follow the latest continuity handoff additively without overwriting shared state.

memory_recovered: The audio evidence claim ladder is not only documentation; it is a controlled vocabulary boundary that must be enforced before cross-team evidence packets are accepted.

observed: CM-0011 defines six non-substitutable audio evidence layers and rejects promotion of browser-visible evidence into human audibility.
inferred: Without validation, later evidence packets can regress to ambiguous phrases such as audio works and erase the distinction preserved by CM-0011.
proposed: Require layer, claim_state, source, timestamp, environment, and falsification route for every audio claim.
superseded: Unqualified audio success phrases are acceptable final evidence labels.
unresolved: The validator is not yet wired into every Vercel, Frontier Research, and deployment evidence workflow.

falsification_or_review_route: Run the committed tests and inspect CM-0011. Reject this artifact if the validator permits collapsed audio-success language, accepts unknown layers, or omits a falsification route.
